    "one_sentence_positioning": "A highly pragmatic, anti-hype AI engineering practitioner who bridges the gap between high-level AI news and deep technical implementation of agentic workflows, observability, and context management.",
    "strongest_system_value": "Exceptional practical specificity in designing agentic workflows (Claude Code, Cursor, MCP) and deep architectural insights (File-first vs RAG, Context Rot, AI Observability).",
